items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of net terms or due-date tracking. The linked use case mentions the need for these features, but there is no direct evidence that this requirement has been explicitly validated or confirmed in the saga steps.
